title: Craftasaddle
description: Now part of the game! This changes the recipe to add copper and string if you feel the current one is too basic.
body:
### You can now craft a saddle with 5 leather, 1 string, and 2 copper. 

## Update 1.1

The quantum invigorator now supersedes the Dow Jones trading algorithm, causing the flux capacitor to increase its volatile electron levels and a phase shift from positive ion charges, which in turn make the extra chocolate decrease. 

This mod was made by me.
Enjoy!

**_-qs_**
